name: Convos Agents
postCreateCommand: npm install -g pnpm@8.7.5 && rm -rf pool/node_modules dashboard/node_modules runtime/openclaw/node_modules runtime/hermes/node_modules && cd pool && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../dashboard && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../runtime/openclaw && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../hermes && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pip install -r requirements.txt
